headline: Assessing Blackstone (BX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Blackstone stock performance snapshot Blackstone (BX) has drawn investor attention after a recent period where the stock is down about 9% over the past month and roughly 2% over the past 3 months, against a backdrop of mixed longer term returns. See our latest analysis for Blackstone. At a share price of US$118.51, Blackstone’s recent 1 month share price return of down 8.65% and year to date decline of 25.37% contrast with a 3 year total shareholder return of 51.74%. This indicates fading...
